## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] `ruff check . --fix` passes.
- [ ] `mypy src` passes.
- [ ] `pytest -v --cov=rylox --cov-report=term-missing` passes.
